summary: Set 083 S1: shipped ai_router/verify_session.py, the Step-6 verify_session CLI (deterministic evidence bundle with git status + full diff and default generated-bundle exclusions, verification.md template fill, cross-provider route(task_type=session-verification), raw sN-verification*.md write-before-display, sN-issues*.json envelope on findings, classify_blocking wiring, idempotent field-preserving disposition patch, L-064-7 tier-pin refusal, --dry-run) plus its 41-test Layer-1 suite. Dogfooded per spec: this session's own Step 6 ran through the new CLI for all three rounds (routed gate REQUIRED); gpt-5-4 found 3 real Majors across rounds 1-2 (tier guard last-row vs round-1-row, test import target, unreadable-round-1-row fallthrough), all fixed with regression tests; round 3 VERIFIED.

reason.specifics: The routed ai-assignment.md analysis (gemini-pro, Step 3.5) recommends Gemini Code Assist gemini-3-pro @ high for Session 2: surgical modification of existing gate/validation modules (close_session.py, gate_checks.py, disposition.py) plus a comprehensive edge-case test matrix, which the analysis rated a core strength for codebase-aware surgical work.
